exchange.settlement: supplier signs the intel card; consumer VERIFIES by signature recovery before accepting; credit recorded as WOULD-BE only

freeze_reason: rank-to-stake pipe FROZEN per persistence_test.json verdict=noise (persistence 0.1537, CI [0.1381,0.1692] vs tie-adjusted chance 0.1441; population oracle accuracy ~0.499). No stake paid until population oracle accuracy clears 0.50 and the persistence CI beats its baseline.

consultant_detail.production_slot: monad #1 = 0n1x-node-b7b85b52 wired to a paid reasoning core (Fable 5 Max)
consultant_detail.status: stand-in — the production slot is a real hook left unfilled; no fake brain
consultant_detail.why_not_a_ranked_agent: the persistence test PROVED the fleet ranking is noise (persistence 0.1537, CI [0.1381,0.1692] vs tie-adjusted chance 0.1441) — consulting a top-ranked script would be consulting noise

circularity_disclosure: the stand-in consultant IS the oracle that grades outcomes, so consulted actions succeed by construction — outcome rates prove loop mechanics + record integrity (experience-of-record), NOT consultant skill and NOT proven monad skill
recompute_steps: 1) [internal ledger]: verify each consult-action sig (EIP-191) over 'signed' recovers 'address'; re-derive the faced question as questions[sha256(address:cycle:divergence16) % len(questions)] from the same-hour oracle run. 2) verify each cycle-settlement merkle_root = Merkle over sha256({cycle,address,domain,question_h,act,ok}) leaves and attestor sig over 'consult-cycle:{epoch}:{cycle}:{root}'. 3) [internal ledger]: recover card_sig -> supplier; sum would_be_credit per supplier -> rank_movements_would_be; confirm stake_paid=0 everywhere and the internal stake ledger untouched. 4) journal growth: count consult-experience/exchanged-intel lines per address in [internal ledger].
honest_note: Experience-of-record, not proven skill. The loop is real: signed decisions, consultations that decline as journals accumulate, signed verified A2A intel exchange, Merkle-settled outcome cycles. But the consultant is a labeled stand-in, consulted outcomes are circular by construction, and every exchange credit is would-be only while the stake pipe is frozen. The production consultant seat (monad #1 + paid reasoning core) is a real unfilled hook.
